suppressions.reason: ExpressionEvaluator is a visitor over 20+ AST node types - splitting by node type would scatter related logic
Main orchestrator that registers all 40 passes - high import count is inherent to its role
Tree-sitter WASM must initialize before language loading - sequential by API contract
Parser init must complete before parse() can be called - sequential by API contract
Throws on uninitialized state - standard library pattern for API misuse
Throws on unsupported language/invalid state - caller must handle
Throws when required pass dependency missing - fail-fast design
